cards.prompt: ArrayList vs List<int>: суммируем {1,2,3} в обеих, WriteLine($"{s} {s2}")?
cards.code: using System.Collections; using System.Collections.Generic; var al = new ArrayList(); al.Add(1); al.Add(2); al.Add(3); int s = 0; foreach (object o in al) s += (int)o; var list = new List<int>(); list.Add(1); list.Add(2); list.Add(3); int s2 = 0; foreach (int x in list) s2 += x; System.Console.WriteLine($"{s} {s2}");

cards.prompt: List<int>{10,20,30}: печать Count и (list is IEnumerable<int>)?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; var list = new List<int> { 10, 20, 30 }; System.Console.WriteLine(list.Count); System.Console.WriteLine(list is IEnumerable<int>);

cards.prompt: GC.GetAllocatedBytesForCurrentThread вокруг заливки 1000 int в List<int> (после прогрева) — сколько байт?
cards.code: using System.Collections; using System.Collections.Generic; const int N = 1000; var warm1 = new ArrayList(N); for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) warm1.Add(i); var warm2 = new List<int>(N); for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) warm2.Add(i); long a0 = GC.GetAllocatedBytesForCurrentThread(); var al = new ArrayList(N); for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) al.Add(i); long a1 = GC.GetAllocatedBytesForCurrentThread(); var list = new List<int>(N); for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) list.Add(i); long a2 = GC.GetAllocatedBytesForCurrentThread(); System.Console.WriteLine($"List<int>: {a2 - a1} bytes");
